description_long: This is a luxurious ring displayed atop a plush, deep red satin cushion. The ring features a large, square-cut central gemstone, likely a diamond or a similar clear stone, surrounded by a halo of smaller sparkling stones. The band is crafted from a shiny, silvery metal, possibly platinum or white gold, and is further adorned with additional small stones along its shoulders. The cushion beneath the ring is smooth and lustrous, providing a striking contrast to the brilliance of the jewelry. The overall design is ornate and eye-catching, with a classic yet glamorous appeal. This piece would be suitable for formal occasions or as an engagement ring.
description: A sparkling, square-cut gemstone ring with a halo of smaller stones, set on a shiny metal band and displayed on a red satin cushion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central gemstone and the halo of smaller stones, with the band partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the band and the raised setting of the central stone, as well as the cushion's texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back of the band and the under-gallery of the setting, with the cushion as a backdrop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the band’s profile and the arrangement of stones along the shoulders.
